requirement_topic.en: Canadian Importer, Certification Scope, and Technical File Control
requirement_topic.zh: 加拿大进口商、认证范围及技术文件控制
requirement_topic.zht: 加拿大進口商、認證範圍及技術文件控制

summary.en: Canada market access depends on the Canadian importer/dealer maintaining evidence that each model is approved, correctly labelled, and within the certification body's accredited scope. The mandatory obligations arise from Canadian electrical safety, ISED, NRCan, customs, and consumer protection regimes; CSA, ICES, and product test methods are evidence routes. A valid file should include certification listing, test reports, model construction details, bilingual labels/instructions, importer identity, and change-control records.
summary.zh: 加拿大市场准入依赖加拿大进口商/经销商保存证据，证明每个型号已获批准、标识正确且处于认证机构认可范围内。强制义务来自加拿大电气安全、ISED、NRCan、海关及消费者保护制度；CSA、ICES 及产品测试方法是证据路径。有效文件应包括认证列名、检测报告、型号结构资料、双语标签/说明书、进口商身份及变更控制记录。
summary.zht: 加拿大市場准入依賴加拿大進口商/經銷商保存證據，證明每個型號已獲批准、標識正確且處於認證機構認可範圍內。強制義務來自加拿大電氣安全、ISED、NRCan、海關及消費者保護制度；CSA、ICES 及產品測試方法是證據路徑。有效文件應包括認證列名、檢測報告、型號結構資料、雙語標籤/說明書、進口商身份及變更控制記錄。

standards_or_laws: SCC accreditation programs for product, process and service certification bodies
NRCan energy efficiency reporting where applicable

summary.en: China files are commonly built around CCC certificates, factory inspection records, GB test reports, and Chinese product labels. These documents help identify construction and bill-of-materials baselines, but they do not prove Canadian importer responsibility, SCC-accredited certification scope, ICES status, NRCan reporting, or bilingual artwork approval.
summary.zh: 中国文件通常围绕 CCC 证书、工厂检查记录、GB 检测报告及中文产品标签建立。这些文件有助于识别结构和物料清单基线，但不能证明加拿大进口商责任、SCC 认可认证范围、ICES 状态、NRCan 报告或双语版面批准。
summary.zht: 中國文件通常圍繞 CCC 證書、工廠檢查記錄、GB 檢測報告及中文產品標籤建立。這些文件有助於識別結構和物料清單基線，但不能證明加拿大進口商責任、SCC 認可認證範圍、ICES 狀態、NRCan 報告或雙語版面批准。

standards_or_laws: CCC implementation rules and factory inspection records
GB 7000.1 and related China lighting safety standards

gap.en: The Canadian file must connect the exact SKU, electrical ratings, production factory, certification listing, and label artwork. A common China-to-Canada failure is using a recognized brand mark or CB/CCC report without checking SCC accreditation scope and Canadian certification listing status. Engineering changes to drivers, LEDs, plastics, thermal materials, or firmware can invalidate the Canadian listing if not reported through the certification body.
gap.zh: 加拿大文件必须将准确 SKU、电气额定值、生产工厂、认证列名及标签版面关联起来。中国出口加拿大常见问题是使用认可品牌标志或 CB/CCC 报告，却未核查 SCC 认可范围和加拿大认证列名状态。驱动器、LED、塑料、导热材料或固件的工程变更，如未通过认证机构报告，可能使加拿大列名失效。
gap.zht: 加拿大文件必須將準確 SKU、電氣額定值、生產工廠、認證列名及標籤版面關聯起來。中國出口加拿大常見問題是使用認可品牌標誌或 CB/CCC 報告，卻未核查 SCC 認可範圍和加拿大認證列名狀態。驅動器、LED、塑料、導熱材料或韌體的工程變更，如未通過認證機構報告，可能使加拿大列名失效。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory as evidence control for regulated obligations — importer/dealer must be able to support Canadian approval, ISED, NRCan, and labelling claims
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for China domestic CCC file maintenance where product is in scope; Canada-specific importer evidence is separate

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Canada, certification is only useful when the certification body is SCC-accredited for the relevant product scope and the exact model is covered by the Canadian listing. China CCC documentation is supporting history, not a Canadian market-access file.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】对于加拿大，只有认证机构在相关产品范围内获得 SCC 认可且准确型号被加拿大列名覆盖时，认证才具有实际意义。中国 CCC 文件只是支持性历史资料，不是加拿大市场准入文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】對於加拿大，只有認證機構在相關產品範圍內獲得 SCC 認可且準確型號被加拿大列名覆蓋時，認證才具有實際意義。中國 CCC 文件只是支持性歷史資料，不是加拿大市場准入文件。
